mode_reason: Pre-flight Operator Directive Discovery returned DIRECTIVE-20260502-004 (priority=high, target_mode=Mode 4 PROP authorship). Directive routes to Mode 4 and overrides normal Mode 1-4 selection logic.

directive_processed.title: Author PROP for source-file rescue gap

findings.description: Confirmed source-file rescue gap class: decider's coherent multi-file commits silently drop NEVER_PUSH source-file half when push 403s. INSTANCE-1 caused 2 test failures in main on 2026-05-02 (PRED-105 schema drift, undetected ~3h).
findings.evidence: Forensic trace of 317 decider/related commits across 14d window. 4 mixed data+source commits identified. INSTANCE-1 (2026-05-02 13:19Z run) is the first observed silent-drift instance under universal-pusher. INSTANCE-2 (2026-04-20) and INSTANCE-3 (2026-04-21 PROP-010) survived because pushes succeeded. INSTANCE-4 (2026-04-25) survived because operator clone-rescued before universal-pusher existed. push-failure-2026-05-02T13-22.json confirms the 403; rescue commit ed521866 confirms test.js was NOT rescued.

suggested_fix.primary: PROP-016 Mechanism A (HALT-AND-REQUIRE-HUMAN at decider's apply step)
suggested_fix.rationale: Catches bug at authorship rather than rescue. Aligns with existing handoff patterns. Preserves NEVER_PUSH semantics. ~1 stranded suggested-patches per 12d projected friction — well below operator's pain threshold.
suggested_fix.alternatives_considered: B (warn-only — DOES NOT FIX); C (universal-pusher expansion — REJECTED, violates NEVER_PUSH); D (schema extraction — OPTIONAL companion); E (post-rescue test gate — defense-in-depth, ship after A)
